claim_boundary: Preregistered synthetic development evidence only. It does not prove three-dimensional reconstruction, neural-operator superiority, real OERF validity, cross-family audit generalization, novelty, or a paper claim.
mandatory_next_gate: field JVP/VJP dot tests and equal-budget three-dimensional reconstruction

analysis_recovery.claim_boundary: Blind analysis-code recovery only; no numerical checkpoint payload was inspected before the recovery protocol was frozen.
